mapper.sql: id, mac_address, agent_id, session_id, chat_type, content, audio_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mac_address) FROM ai_agent_chat_history WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mac_address) FROM ai_agent_chat_history WHERE YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(CURDATE())

SELECT DISTINCT h.mac_address as macAddress, u.username as ownerName FROM ai_agent_chat_history h LEFT JOIN ai_device d ON h.mac_address = d.mac_address LEFT JOIN ai_agent a ON d.agent_id = a.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE DATE(h.created_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY h.mac_address

SELECT DISTINCT h.mac_address as macAddress, u.username as ownerName FROM ai_agent_chat_history h LEFT JOIN ai_device d ON h.mac_address = d.mac_address LEFT JOIN ai_agent a ON d.agent_id = a.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE YEAR(h.created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(h.created_at) = MONTH(CURDATE()) ORDER BY h.mac_address
